Requirement: UCIe Module must send 64-UI clock pattern (1010...) and 32-UI low on both SB data Tx
UCIe Module Partner must sample incoming SB data patterns with incoming clock
On pattern detection on at least one SB data-clock Rx combo, must stop sending after completing current iteration
If pattern not detected, must continue alternating for total of 8ms then timeout to TRAINERROR
After detection, SB Tx/Rx must be enabled for functional sideband messages
Must send {SBINIT Out of Reset} sideband message continuously until partner detection
Must send {SBINIT done req} and wait for {SBINIT done resp} before exiting to MBINIT
Module partner must ignore received {SBINIT done req} if not ready to proceed
Module partner must collapse multiple outstanding {SBINIT done req} messages into single response
Must exchange Tx voltage swing, max data rate, clock mode, clock phase, UCIe-Sx8, SB feature extensions, Tx adjust runtime, module ID via sideband
UCIe Module Partner must respond with max common data rate (min of local and remote)
Clock mode in response must match the request value
If interoperable params not found, must escalate error
On receiving {MBINIT.PARAM configuration resp}, must exit to MBINIT.CAL
MBINIT stall handling: {MBINIT.PARAM SBFE resp} with stall encoding must be sent once every 4ms
Sideband Feature Extensions (SBFE) negotiation if SB_MGMT_UP flag is set
Must send {MBINIT.CAL Done req} and wait for {MBINIT.CAL Done resp}
On receiving {MBINIT.CAL Done resp}, must exit to MBINIT.REPAIRCLK
Must enable Tx/Rx on Clock, Track, and redundant lanes
Must send clock repair pattern and check repair success via Tx-initiated point test
If clock/track unrepairable, must exit to TRAINERROR via handshake
On {MBINIT.REPAIRCLK done resp}, must exit to MBINIT.REPAIRVAL
Must set clock phase at center of data UI; partner must sample Valid with forwarded clock
All Data lanes must be held low during Valid repair
Must send 128 iterations of VALTRAIN pattern (unscrambled) on VLD
If repair unsuccessful or unrepairable, must exit to TRAINERROR
On {MBINIT.REPAIRVAL done resp}, must exit to MBINIT.REVERSALMB
Must send {MBINIT.REVERSALMB init req} and wait for resp
Must send Per Lane ID pattern on all N data lanes (128 iterations, unscrambled)
Partner must perform per-lane compare on all N Rx lanes
Must correctly detect lane reversal and apply if needed
On {MBINIT.REVERSALMB done resp}, must exit to MBINIT.REPAIRMB
Must exit to TRAINERROR on detection failure
Must send 128 iterations of Per Lane ID pattern (unscrambled) for lane testing
Rx must check pass/fail on data lanes and redundant lanes
If post-repair errors persist, must exit to TRAINERROR
If unrepairable, must exit to TRAINERROR
On {MBINIT.REPAIRMB end resp}, must exit to MBTRAIN
Partner must set forwarded clock phase at center of data UI on Tx
Must sample Valid with forwarded clock; all data lanes and Track held low
Must use 128 iterations of continuous VALTRAIN pattern (unscrambled)
Detection success if VALTRAIN errors < per-lane threshold
On {MBTRAIN.VALVREF end resp}, must exit to MBTRAIN.DATAVREF
Must use 4K UI of continuous LFSR pattern with correct valid framing
Detection success if total error count < threshold per lane
On {MBTRAIN.DATAVREF end resp}, must exit to MBTRAIN.SPEEDIDLE
If from DATAVREF: must transition to highest common speed
If from L1: must restore operating speed from last ACTIVE
Else must exit to TRAINERROR
Data/Clock/Valid/Track Tx are tri-stated; Rx permitted to be disabled
Partner must start sending forwarded clock and Track after start req received
Must use 4K UI continuous LFSR pattern with valid framing
Must verify link at operating speed via Tx-initiated point test or eye sweep
If link test passes, must exit to LINKINIT
If link test fails, must exit to PHYRETRAIN with speed degrade encoding
Scrambler LFSR must be RESET upon entering this state
Must coordinate with D2D Adapter to complete RDI Active entry
All data must be scrambled using LFSR described in 4.4.1
Data/Valid/Clock/Track Tx must be tri-stated; Rx permitted to be disabled
If no response for 8ms, LTSM transitions to TRAINERROR unconditionally
PHY must remain in RESET for minimum 4ms upon every entry
Must not exit RESET until pwrGood, pllLock, and resetMinWait all asserted
Requester and responder currentState must be synchronized at all transitions
LFSR must follow polynomial and implementation per 4.4.1
